name: Slide
description: A low-profile committed movement state that carries the character forward under a slide friction curve, often passing under hazards or extending momentum.
design_notes: Slide needs a clear start condition, body shape change, friction model, and recovery rule. Decide whether it is a movement shortcut, combat evasion, slope interaction, or traversal gate. Collision capsule edits and camera offset must be authored carefully because the player often commits to a slide before seeing the full obstacle outcome.
design_purpose: Let players convert momentum into a low-profile traversal or evasion action.
Create readable gates under obstacles, projectiles, vents, or closing doors.
Add commitment and style to high-mobility movement without making dash redundant.
player_fantasy: The player feels quick and daring, slipping beneath danger while carrying momentum forward.

parameters.name: slide_entry_velocity_min
parameters.description: Minimum horizontal velocity required before slide activation.

parameters.name: slide_window_ms
parameters.description: Committed slide interval before automatic recovery can begin.

parameters.name: slide_friction_curve_id
parameters.description: Curve that reduces or preserves forward slide velocity.

parameters.name: slide_capsule_height_multiplier
parameters.description: Temporary collision height multiplier while sliding.

parameters.name: slide_exit_clearance_height
parameters.description: Vertical clearance required before returning to stand or run.

parameters.name: slide_cancel_after_ms
parameters.description: Earliest point where jump, crouch, roll, or attack cancel is allowed.

edge_cases: The player reaches slide_exit_clearance_height failure under a low ceiling and must stay crouched or prone.
Sliding from a moving platform needs parent velocity transfer without launching after detach.
Slope transitions can either accelerate, clamp, or cancel slide depending on slide_friction_curve_id.
A slide started before stun, knockback, or cutscene control must restore collision_capsule_height exactly once.
common_bugs: Capsule height shrinks without moving the capsule center, causing feet or head collision penetration.
Slide friction is applied in render update and differs by frame rate.
Exit clearance checks ignore triggers or dynamic obstacles and stand the player inside geometry.
Animation events re-enable standing before movement_state_id has left slide.
balancing_notes: Low entry requirements make slide a default movement habit; stricter requirements make it an authored traversal tool.
Allowing attacks, reloads, or invulnerability during slide changes it from locomotion into combat defense.
Long slide windows need enough steering or cancel options to avoid frustrating forced commitments.
accessibility_notes: Offer hold, toggle, or auto-slide options for games with frequent low obstacles.
Limit camera dip, motion blur, and sudden field-of-view changes, or expose comfort settings.

implementation_notes.unity: On activation, store previous capsule dimensions, set movement_state_id to slide, and move capsule center and height together. Apply slide_friction_curve_id in FixedUpdate, sweep against collision, and run exit clearance checks before restoring stand dimensions.
implementation_notes.godot: Use a dedicated slide state on CharacterBody. Change CollisionShape height through a stored profile, update velocity in _physics_process, and only exit when a ShapeCast or test_move confirms standing clearance.
implementation_notes.unreal: Use a custom movement state or crouch-derived mode with explicit capsule half-height changes. Animation montage notifies may mark cancel windows, but CharacterMovement should own collision and floor projection.
implementation_notes.web: Store slide_state with window ticks, capsule profile, and friction curve. Resolve collision sweeps against the low capsule first, then test stand-up clearance before returning to run.

example_games.title: Titanfall 2
example_games.note: Uses sliding to preserve momentum across traversal routes.

example_games.title: Apex Legends
example_games.note: Uses slide movement as a mobility and positioning action.
